name: Oat Peach Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Can use fresh, frozen (thawed), or well-drained canned peaches.
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Spray the bottoms of 12 medium muffin cups with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, mix oats and buttermilk.
4. Beat in brown sugar, oil, molasses, vanilla, and egg whites until combined.
5. Stir in remaining ingredients except peaches until the flour is moistened (batter will be lumpy).
6. Fold in peaches.
7. Divide batter evenly among muffin cups (cups will be full).
8. Bake for about 20 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from pan immediately.
Makes 12 muffins.
Per muffin: 155 calories, 4 g protein, 24 g carbohydrate, 5 g fat, 1 g fiber.
